$schema_notes: Edit `scene.type` to switch between scene renderers:
'demo'          → the procedural torus-knot / floating-geometry scene (default).
'image-layers'  → stacked 2D media planes built from `scene.layers` below.
'model'         → a single 3D model. .glb .gltf .fbx .obj .stl
DRACO-compressed and KTX2-textured glTF are handled offline.
'point-cloud'   → a single point cloud. .ply .pcd .xyz
Copy a block from `_examples.*` into `scene` to activate it.
Parallax strength is shared across all scene types.
id        optional label used in console warnings.
src       relative path from this file (e.g. 'assets/shibuya/bg.jpg').
Accepted media: .jpg .jpeg .png .webp .avif (static),
.gif .apng (animated, decoded via hidden ),
.mp4 .webm .mov (video, muted+looped).
anchor    'cover'                                  — fills viewport, preserves aspect (may crop).
'center' | 'left' | 'right' | 'top' | 'bottom'
'top-left' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-right'
widthPct  layer width as a % of the viewport width visible at its depth (ignored for 'cover').
depth     world-space Z. More negative = farther back = parallaxes less.
Camera sits at z=+3; useful depths run roughly -0.3 (near) to -6 (far).
offset    { x, y } fractional viewport offset applied AFTER the anchor snap.
e.g. { x: 0.05 } nudges the layer 5% of viewport width to the right.
── model / point-cloud shared fields ───────────────────────────────────
src       relative path to the asset file.
fit       'auto' (default) → center + rescale so longest bbox axis == fitSize.
'none'           → keep raw file coords (use for scene-scaled models).
fitSize   target size for the longest bounding-box axis when fit='auto' (default 2.0).
position  { x, y, z } applied AFTER fit. World units. z=0 is the glass of the screen.
rotation  { x, y, z } in DEGREES, applied after fit.
scale     number (uniform) or { x, y, z }. Multiplied on top of fit.
animation  'auto' (default — play all clips), 'none', or a clip name string.
pointSize        world-space point size. Default 0.008. Tune per cloud.
useVertexColors  true if the file has per-point colors and you want them (default true).
pointColor       solid color when useVertexColors=false. CSS hex, e.g. '#aeffc7'.
